name: openimago-opencode-plugins
description: OpenImago OpenCode plugins and custom tools — compiled to JS and loaded inside the OpenCode Docker container under /root/.config/opencode/

scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun test
scripts.deploy:plugin: bun run build && docker cp dist/plugins/openimago.js opencode-serve:/root/.config/opencode/plugins/openimago.js && docker cp opencode.json opencode-serve:/root/.config/opencode/opencode.json && docker restart opencode-serve
